mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM upgrade_strategies WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upgrade_strategies (name, release_type, target_version, download_url, release_notes, platform, min_version, total_stages, current_stage, soak_time_minutes, auto_pause_error_rate, auto_pause_enabled, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{releaseType}, #{targetVersion}, #{downloadUrl}, #{releaseNotes}, #{platform}, #{minVersion}, #{totalStages}, #{currentStage}, #{soakTimeMinutes}, #{autoPauseErrorRate}, #{autoPauseEnabled}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE upgrade_strategies SET name = #{name}, release_type = #{releaseType}, target_version = #{targetVersion}, download_url = #{downloadUrl}, release_notes = #{releaseNotes}, platform = #{platform}, min_version = #{minVersion}, total_stages = #{totalStages}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, soak_time_minutes = #{soakTimeMinutes}, auto_pause_error_rate = #{autoPauseErrorRate}, auto_pause_enabled = #{autoPauseEnabled}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM upgrade_strategies ORDER BY created_at DESC
